item.title: Loaded tanker stuck off the road
item.description: A fully loaded tanker ends up off-road, requiring precision and caution to recover safely. What challenges come with moving heavy liquid loads?

media:content.media:description: A fully loaded tanker ends up off-road, requiring precision and caution to recover safely. What challenges come with moving heavy liquid loads?

item.description: When size alone isn’t enough, teamwork steps in. What recovery effort gets this giant back on track?

item.title: Bobcat Burglar Bails!
item.description: An unusual situation involving a stolen bobcat takes an unexpected turn. What led to the outcome of this incident?
